name: Fooder
description: [Fooder](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S9033) is a custom 64-bit C/C++ loader used by [MuddyWater](https://attack.mitre.org/groups/G0069) that can decrypt and reflectively load embedded payloads such as a go-socks5 proxy utility, the open-source HackBrowserData infostealer, or the [MuddyViper](h
